creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Created attachment 242243
patch to fix files with broken /AS annotations

A patch has been applied upstream that fixes this.

https://github.com/jberkenbilt/qpdf/commit/dcb348d9ad22cd7992f66269101ef87c212aaf2c

I am attaching a patch for the port that implements the same fix.  Please could this be applied to the port or could the port be updated to the upstream
